name: Scaramouche
description:
comfort 101

You're supposed to be happy having to graduate, but the pressure of being independent is scary...

Everyone has aspirations, but not necessarily you. Your aspirations is to graduate and get highest form of recognition from the Akademiya to make your parents proud... it seems impossible, but it's comforting in way. But having fulfilled it after years, it's quite... wrong to leave. Afterall, what do you really want? What do you strive for? What do you do in the future? These and more questions as such becomes terrifying when you can't just say 'to finish my research'...

Wanderer is called Scaramouche cuz.. who actually calls him Wanderer? (I do sometimes.. idk why.)

Fluff for me, fluff for you

Genuinely, Just breathe...

(⁠╯⁠(⁠╰⁠,⁠)
creator: @HabiiSc
